home_description_line3: and a keen interest in Art.
about_p1: My name is Guido Bertaina, I am 36 years old and originally from Argentina. Growing up, I cultivated a love for learning and diverse experiences, which led me to pursue a Law degree after high school, while also dedicating time to passions such as rugby, playing the cello, and exploring cultural activities.
about_p2: Traveling has always been a major part of my life. I’ve visited over 65 countries so far and had the chance to live in some of them. In 2016, I took a sabbatical from my role in the Judiciary of Buenos Aires Province to spend a year in Dublin, Ireland—improving my English while working in an Irish bar.
about_p3: Upon returning to Argentina, I completed my Master’s in Administrative Law, defending my thesis titled “Project of Urgent Health Process in the Province of Buenos Aires”.
about_p4: In 2019, I moved back to Europe, living a year in Stockholm, Sweden, working as a scooter mechanic for Voi. Early 2020, I volunteered at a hostel in Jerusalem, Israel, before relocating to Copenhagen, Denmark due to the pandemic. There, I worked in the restaurant industry until late 2021, and later moved to Turin, Italy to obtain my Italian citizenship.
about_p5: In 2022, I returned permanently to Stockholm and began my career as a Software Developer. What started as a hobby has now become my professional path.
about_p6: I remain passionate about technology, continuously learning, experimenting with new tools, frameworks, and architectures, and embracing challenges that push me to grow.
exp_2011_desc: I started my career in the Judiciary in an entry-level role and progressively worked as a mediator for employment cases over eight years.
exp_2013_desc: Graduated with a Law degree from the National University of La Matanza, Buenos Aires, Argentina.
exp_2015_desc: Completed a two-year Master's program in Administrative Law at Austral University, Buenos Aires, Argentina.
exp_2018_desc: Started studying Art Curation at the National University of the Arts, Buenos Aires, Argentina (program unfinished).
exp_2022_desc: Graduated from the Fullstack .NET Bootcamp in Fall 2022 at </Salt>, Stockholm, Sweden.
exp_2023_desc: Began my professional journey as a software developer at Byggdagboken in Ljusdal, Sweden.
exp_future_desc: Continuously exploring modern tools, frameworks, and architectures while expanding my skills.
